asset_registry_record.registry_passed=true and one image asset exists, so the visual dependency is supported by registered assets
multi_step: The task likely requires identifying T's geometric role from the diagram and then using square properties to determine angle WTZ

No multiple-choice options are provided, so solving likely depends on geometric inference rather than elimination
Conservative score because only the text and registry are available, not the actual diagram details
verifiability: answer_type is numeric and answer_text is a short exact value ('90'), which is easy to compare against expected output
The target is a single angle measure, making final-answer verification straightforward
asset_registry_record.answer_manifest.answer_present=true and registry_passed=true support reliable sample packaging
